name: Neo Geo MVS
description: SNK's arcade platform for cartridge-based Neo Geo games, sharing much of its library with the Neo Geo AES home system.

eras.title: Arcade Foundation Era
eras.description: Early Neo Geo period establishing SNK's premium arcade identity through fighting, sports, and action games.

eras.title: Fighting Game Peak Era
eras.description: The King of Fighters, Samurai Shodown, Fatal Fury, and Metal Slug define the platform's strongest identity.

eras.title: Late MVS Era
eras.description: Late releases and long-tail arcade support before SNK fully moves beyond the platform.
